name: Risotto Milanese I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy saucepan. When hot, stir in the rice. Continue stirring until it is pale gold in color.
2. Add the onion. Cook briefly and add 1 cup of chicken stock. Cover and cook slowly over low heat until the liquid is absorbed.
3. Add saffron that has been dissolved in white wine. Add 2 1/2 cups hot chicken stock, and the mushrooms. Cover and continue cooking until all the liquid is absorbed and the rice is fluffy.
4. Add the remaining butter and Parmesan cheese. Stir gently and serve.
